entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized exchange and bridge aggregator providing optimized spot routing, meta-aggregation, cross-chain swaps, split routes, and single-sided liquidity operations through a unified application and API.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and API documentation expose live aggregator and cross-chain products, including production endpoints for HyperEVM and Soneium. Current independent metrics report non-zero DEX aggregator volume. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: KYO AG official API documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies KYO AG as a multi-chain DEX aggregator and documents live quote, swap, meta-aggregator, cross-chain, zap, rebalance, and source-discovery endpoints.

evidence.title: KYO AG DEX aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent protocol metrics classify KYO AG as a DEX aggregator and report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative routed swap volume.
